  1. Home
  2. Translucent Materials

Translucent Materials - Order Custom Translucent Prints

Brighten up your Display with Translucent Materials! Order Adhesive or Non-Adhesive Translucent Products

If you need a new light-up sign, or have an existing light up sign, we can help you get customized translucent prints. Our translucent materials have deep rich colors and opacity consistency throughout the prints so they look great during the day and at night.  

Let the light shine on your design for everyone to see. This advertising style is great for street corners or downtown skyways. Get maximum exposure using translucent materials—order online today!

We offer two different types of translucent materials:

Translucent Vinyl with Adhesive Backing View Product
Translucent Non-Adhesive Backlit Film View Product
  Non Adhesive Backlit Film Translucent Adhesive Backed Vinyl Media
Size 58" max width 58" max width
Materials 5.5 mil backlit film 3 mil translucent media
Lamination Yes - additional cost Yes - additional cost
Square / Contour Cut Square Die Cut, Kiss Cut, or Transfer Cut
Additional Information   7 year life span

 

 

Frequently Asked Questions Return to Top

What material choices are available for translucent (backlit) prints?

We offer two translucent materials: Translucent Non-Adhesive Backlit Film and Adhesive-Backed Translucent Vinyl. The non-adhesive film is 5.5 mil and scratch and water-resistant, and the adhesive-backed vinyl is 3 mil with a semi-gloss finish and up to 7-year durability with the long-term lamination option.

What are the size limits for translucent backlit film and translucent vinyl?

Both material options can be printed up to 144" × 58".

What colors/ink system do you use to print translucent materials?

We digitally print using CMYK (cyan, magenta, yellow, and black).

Do you offer bulk pricing for translucent material products?

Yes—bulk discounts are available, and pricing decreases as quantity increases.

Why Choose Banners.com?

Customer Service

Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

Fast Turnaround

Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your order on your schedule.

 

Quality Products

Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology.

Live Order Tracking

Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.

title: Translucent Materials | Banners.com
metaDescription: We offer an adhesive backed translucent vinyl media, and a non-adhesive translucent backlit media. You can add a lamination to both.
